activationChecklist.subtitle: Follow the next best action to reach first value faster.
activationChecklist.helper: Complete ICP setup, import, first analysis, and first follow-up to fully unlock the workflow.

auth.signupSubtitle: Create your workspace to qualify your leads.
auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to your AimLeads workspace.
auth.inviteDetectedBody: Use {{email}} to join this workspace automatically.
auth.selectedPlanBody: You are starting on the {{plan}} plan. Create your account to open your workspace and reach value faster.
auth.inviteEmailLocked: This email is locked to avoid creating the wrong workspace by mistake. Sign in or sign up with the invited address.
auth.captchaHint: Supabase Bot Protection (CAPTCHA) is enabled. In local development, disable it in Supabase Auth > Settings or add a real captcha flow.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgot.sentBody: Check your inbox at {{email}} for a password reset link.
forgot.errorFallback: Failed to send reset email. Please try again.

reset.title: Set a new password
reset.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account and we'll sign you back in automatically.
reset.missingTokens: This reset link is missing recovery tokens. Request a new email before choosing a new password.

landing.heroBadge: AI made accessible for SMBs and mid-market teams
landing.heroTitleLine1: AI that gets the work done.
landing.heroSubtitle: Aimlead makes AI concrete and profitable, from Claude training to full outbound automation.

one.title: Fast setup without dead-end steps
one.body: ICP, import, first analysis, and the next action live in one readable flow.

two.title: Scores the team can actually read
two.body: Score, signals, and CTA stay understandable for founders, SDRs, and managers.

three.title: Built to convert into action
three.body: The goal is not to display data. It is to trigger the right commercial move.

productCards.advisoryDescription: Master Claude with our 3-track offer: prompting, integrations, and AI enablement.
productCards.leadDescription: Automated scoring, ICP matching, and signal detection for your SDRs.
productCards.bdrDescription: Calls, follow-ups, email: an AI agent prospecting for you 24/7.

blocks.oneDescription: Free audit, clear roadmap, and prioritization of high-ROI use cases. We structure the rollout for you.
blocks.twoTitle: My teams are not adopting it
blocks.twoDescription: Tailored training in 3 tracks, adapted to your market. Adoption first, not vague inspiration.
blocks.threeDescription: Automated scoring plus AI BDR: your SDRs focus on hot prospects, the rest is automated.

landing.finalSubtitle: 30 minutes to identify your top 3 AI priorities and leave with a concrete action plan.

workflow.subtitle: Aimlead is not just another AI layer. The product takes you from the initial audit to qualification, then all the way to the next concrete action for your sales team.

metrics.audit: to frame a useful first audit or setup
metrics.scoring: engine to score, read signals, and prioritize
metrics.followUp: follow-up possibilities once the pipeline is live

steps.auditBody: Define the ICP, the right roles, and the right company size so scoring does not start from nowhere.
steps.scoreBody: Leads are imported, compared to your ICP, then enriched with signals that make the priority understandable.
steps.actionBody: Each result pushes you to the next step: open the best lead, trigger a message, or move the pipeline forward.

workflow.panelHeadline: A readable score, understandable signals, and a CTA that is ready to use.
workflow.panelBody: The product is designed to avoid decorative dashboards. Every screen should help someone decide, prioritize, or act.
workflow.sideBody: See how scoring, signals, and the recommended commercial action align in the product.

proof.subtitle: Aimlead is designed to help a sales team know what to look at, what to prioritize, and what to do next, without getting lost in an opaque AI layer.

points.one: A free audit to quickly frame the right use cases and avoid vague AI projects.
points.two: Readable scoring that turns raw leads into priorities the field team can actually understand.
points.three: A concrete handoff into the pipeline, the lead review, or the next outreach action.

cards.auditBody: We identify priorities, friction points, and the right product path before automating too early.
cards.scoreBody: The score, signals, and recommendation stay understandable for both decision-makers and SDRs.
cards.pipelineBody: The goal is not just analysis. The product pushes toward the next useful pipeline step.
cards.teamBody: Perceived value rises when teams understand the result and know what to do with it immediately.

one.title: Your sales team stops sorting by hand.
one.body: The product should reduce qualification friction before the pipeline even gets large.

two.title: Priorities become explainable.
two.body: The workflow surfaces a readout that can be defended in review, not opaque AI output nobody can challenge.

three.title: Every result pushes toward a clear next step.
three.body: Open the lead, trigger a message, move the pipeline: the next move stays visible.

pricing.titleLine2: A scale-up path without the fog.
pricing.subtitle: Pick the level that fits your team, your scoring volume, and the amount of support you need. The goal is to unlock the right capacity at the right time.

cards.starterBody: For founders, solo SDRs, and teams that want a first ICP → scoring → action loop without complexity.
cards.teamBody: For small sales teams that need a shared workflow, better follow-up, and a clearer ROI view.
cards.scaleBody: For revenue teams deploying AimLeads across multiple operators and wanting more product autonomy and support.

roi.title: Keep the focus on value created.
roi.subtitle: Track the numbers that actually help the team decide: qualification rate, leads ready for action, and credit runway.
roi.focusWithoutIcp: Activate an ICP to make scoring reliable

roi.nextMovePending: Finish the minimum setup: import, first analysis, then review the best lead. This is the shortest path to perceived value.

roiBoard.defaultAction: Open the lead and define the next action.

attention.title: Key blockers stay in plain sight.
attention.subtitle: This keeps the issues that actually slow down the move from scoring to commercial action visible.
attention.allClear: Nothing blocking right now: this workspace still has enough capacity to keep moving.

items.analysis: Run the first analysis to turn raw leads into priorities.
items.credits: Credits are getting low, so it is worth planning the next capacity step.

items.crmLocked: The current plan does not unlock CRM connections yet.

monetization.title: The right moment to recalibrate becomes visible.

aiActivity.title: AI runs become readable for the team.
aiActivity.subtitle: This turns raw AI execution into something operators can actually use: what is running, what is failing, what it costs, and what deserves follow-up.
aiActivity.listTitle: Latest AI actions in the workspace
aiActivity.listSubtitle: Track the analyses, enrichments, and sequences that actually ran without digging through logs.

empty.title: No visible AI activity yet

leads.title: Leads
leads.noLeadsSubtitle: Import your first list or add a lead manually.
leads.heroSignalsEmpty: No standout signal yet. Use the score and baseline fit to decide the next move.
leads.primaryActionFallback: Review this lead and choose the next outreach step.
leads.primaryActionContact: Best next move: contact this lead while the fit and timing are still strong.
leads.primaryActionNurture: Best next move: keep this lead warm with a structured follow-up sequence.
leads.primaryActionReject: Best next move: do not prioritize this lead until the signal quality improves.

analysisLevels.pendingDescription: No analysis has been generated for this lead yet.
analysisLevels.quickDescription: Fast deterministic scoring based on ICP and available lead data.
analysisLevels.deepDescription: Lead enriched with LLM reasoning and tailored outreach suggestions.
analysisLevels.fullDescription: Deep analysis plus external signals and web evidence.

whyItMatters.high: High-fit lead with strong priority indicators and a credible next action.
whyItMatters.boosted: External or behavioral signals materially improved this lead beyond the ICP baseline.
whyItMatters.signals: This lead stands out because of {{signals}}.
whyItMatters.quick: This first-pass result is enough to decide whether the lead deserves deeper follow-up.
whyItMatters.default: Review the score, the strongest signals, and the suggested action before moving this lead forward.

leads.leadNotFoundBody: The requested lead does not exist or has been removed.
leads.finalScoreFormula: Final score = deterministic ICP + internet signals (web research, news, email)
leads.noIcebreakersYet: No icebreakers generated yet. Re-analyze to generate AI-personalized outreach.
leads.noSignalsYet: No signals yet. Re-analyze to generate AI signals or rescan the website.
leads.noAnalysisSummaryYet: No analysis summary yet. Re-analyze to generate one.
leads.unsavedChangesDescription: You have unsaved changes on this lead. Discard them or stay to save.
leads.asyncJobQueued: Background job queued. You can keep working while AimLeads finishes it.
leads.noNewSignals: No new signals detected for this lead
leads.deleteSelectedBody: This action cannot be undone. The selected leads will be permanently removed from your workspace.
leads.deleteLeadBody: This action cannot be undone. This lead will be permanently removed from your workspace.

accountSettings.title: Account settings
accountSettings.subtitle: Manage your profile and security settings.
accountSettings.profileSubtitle: Update your display name and account information.
accountSettings.emailCannotChange: Email address cannot be changed here.
accountSettings.passwordRecoverySubtitle: This account uses managed authentication. Start the reset-password flow instead of changing it directly here.
accountSettings.passwordRecoveryHint: We'll send you a secure recovery link so you can set a new password without risking a failed in-app update.
accountSettings.passwordChangeSubtitle: Minimum 8 characters with at least 1 uppercase letter and 1 number.
accountSettings.exportSubtitle: Download your GDPR data in JSON. The workspace export is the most complete one.
accountSettings.exportDescription: The workspace export includes members, invites, leads, ICP profiles, credits, and the audit log. The account export remains available separately if you only want your personal data.
accountSettings.deleteSubtitle: Irreversible action. Your account is removed from the workspace, but the workspace itself is not deleted automatically.
accountSettings.deleteWarning1: If you are the only owner, transfer workspace ownership first.
accountSettings.deleteWarning2: Shared workspace data will not be deleted by this action.
accountSettings.deleteWarning3: This action is final and cannot be undone.
accountSettings.passwordMinLength: New password must be at least 8 characters.
accountSettings.passwordNeedsUppercase: New password must contain at least one uppercase letter.
accountSettings.passwordNeedsNumber: New password must contain at least one number.
accountSettings.versionInfoSubtitle: Use this fingerprint to verify that a container or domain is serving the latest build.

billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: See your plan, quotas, and real AI usage for the workspace.
billing.runwayHint: Projection based on the last 30 days.
billing.teamSeatsHint: Capacity included in the current plan.
billing.crmSlotsHint: Number of CRM integrations planned for this plan.
billing.availablePlansHint: Plan changes remain sales-assisted for now. No fake Stripe checkout here.
billing.salesManagedPlan: Plan managed with your account executive
billing.salesManagedBody: Plan changes, credit top-ups, invoices, and payment history are still handled with your AimLeads contact.
billing.supportOwnerBody: As the owner, you can request a plan review or a credit top-up directly.
billing.supportMemberBody: If you are not the owner, route the request through the workspace owner or the AimLeads team.
billing.nextBestActionTitle: Need a quota or plan review?
billing.nextBestActionBody: We can recalibrate credits, plan size, and support level based on your actual usage.
billing.crmSlotsReached: All CRM slots are currently in use.

pricing.title: Simple plans designed for real growth in usage.
pricing.subtitle: Each plan unlocks more capacity, collaboration, and integrations without pretending a Stripe self-serve billing flow already exists.
pricing.reviewBody: We can help you choose based on lead volume, number of operators, and the level of guidance you want.

steps.one: 1. Create the workspace and choose the capacity that matches your team.
steps.two: 2. Import leads, activate your ICP, then score your first batch in minutes.
steps.three: 3. Invite the team or request a strategy review if you want a guided rollout.

toasts.sequenceFailed: Sequence generation failed. Check that ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is configured and an active ICP exists.

featureFlags.title: Feature flags
featureFlags.subtitle: Control workspace rollouts one workspace at a time.
featureFlags.body: Use these toggles to prepare or gradually unlock product and platform capabilities without rolling them out to everyone at once.
featureFlags.readOnly: Only workspace owners and admins can manage these flags.
featureFlags.toggleAria: Enable or disable the {{flag}} feature flag

toasts.failed: Failed to update this feature flag.

livePlan.teamBody: This page now surfaces whether the current team limit is starting to slow down invites, collaboration, or rollout.
livePlan.crmSummary: {{used}} live CRM connection(s) out of {{total}}, {{remaining}} remaining.
livePlan.billingBody: Plan, credit balance, projected runway, and CRM capacity stay visible here without leaving Settings.

crm.title: CRM integrations
crm.subtitle: Push qualified leads to HubSpot or Salesforce automatically or manually. Qualified leads can then be synced cleanly from inside the product.
crm.noSyncSubtitle: Connect your CRM and start syncing leads.

providers.hubspot: Sync leads as contacts in your HubSpot account.
providers.salesforce: Sync leads as Lead objects in your Salesforce org.

capacity.title: CRM connections
capacity.limitReached: The current plan CRM limit has been reached. Go through the AimLeads team to unlock more connections.
capacity.planHint: {{count}} CRM connection(s) are included in your current plan.

mapping.title: Field mapping — {{crm}}
mapping.customFieldHint: requires a custom property in your CRM.

fields.newTokenPlaceholder: New token (leave blank to keep the current one)

actions.disconnectConfirmBody: This removes the stored token. Leads already synced remain in your CRM and you will be able to reconnect {{crm}} at any time.

instructions.toggle: How do I get the token?
instructions.hubspotPropertiesBody: Create these properties on the Contact object in HubSpot:

hubspotSteps.one: Sign in to your HubSpot account.
hubspotSteps.two: Go to Settings → Integrations → Private Apps.
hubspotSteps.four: Give it a name, for example AimLeads.
hubspotSteps.five: In Scopes, enable crm.objects.contacts.write and crm.objects.contacts.read.
hubspotSteps.six: Create the app, then copy the generated token.

salesforceSteps.one: Sign in to your Salesforce org.
salesforceSteps.two: Go to Setup → Manage Connected Apps.
salesforceSteps.three: Create a connected app with OAuth enabled.
salesforceSteps.four: Use the session token returned after authentication.
salesforceSteps.five: Also copy your instance URL, for example https://mycompany.salesforce.com.

errors.salesforceInstanceRequired: The Salesforce instance URL is required.
errors.limitReached: The workspace has reached the CRM limit for the current plan.

team.title: Team
team.subtitle: Manage the members in your workspace.
team.inviteDescription: Create a pending invite for this email. The teammate joins the workspace when they sign up with the same address.
team.noInvitesHint: Create an invite to add your first teammate.
team.joinFlowBody: They need to create their account with the invited email address. If transactional emails are not live yet, copy the signup link below and share it manually.
team.onlyAdminsCanInvite: Only workspace owners and admins can create invites. Members can still use the workspace normally.
team.pendingInvitesDescription: Pending invites stay here until the teammate signs up with the invited email or you revoke the invite.
team.pendingInvitesRestricted: Pending invites are visible only to admins and owners.
team.singleMemberDescription: You're currently the only member in this workspace.
team.membersDescription: Manage who can collaborate on qualification, pipeline reviews, and outreach.
team.transferOwnershipConfirm: Transfer workspace ownership to {{member}}? You will become an admin.
team.ownerRemovalHint: Transfer ownership before removing this owner
team.ownerTransferHint: Owners can transfer ownership safely before offboarding. Non-owner members can be removed without breaking workspace access.
team.rolesPermissionsDescription: Keep role choices simple and explicit while intentionally limiting sensitive offboarding actions.

seats.title: Plan capacity
seats.summary: {{used}} active member(s) + {{pending}} pending invite(s) across {{total}} included seat(s).
seats.limitReached: The current plan seat limit has been reached. Go through the AimLeads team to add more capacity.

team.ownerDescription: Full workspace control, including role management and ownership transfer.
team.adminDescription: Can invite members and manage pending invites.
team.memberDescription: Can use the workspace but cannot manage access.
team.readOnlyWarning: Your workspace membership could not be verified. Team management stays read-only until the membership record is repaired.

access.membershipIssueBody: We could not match this session to a valid workspace membership yet.
access.ownerBody: You can manage invites, roles, ownership transfer, and access changes.
access.adminBody: You can invite teammates and manage pending invites.
access.memberBody: You can use the workspace, but access changes stay read-only.
access.inviteRestriction: Invite creation and role changes are available only to admins and owners.

errors.createInviteBeforeCopy: Create an invite before copying the signup link.
errors.clipboardUnavailable: Clipboard access is not available in this browser.
errors.copyInviteFailed: Failed to copy the signup link.
errors.seatLimitReached: The workspace has reached the seat limit for the current plan.

help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: Guides and resources to use AimLeads well.

page.title: Help Center
page.subtitle: The fastest way to unblock onboarding, account access, import quality, and team collaboration without hunting through settings.
page.playbooksDescription: Use these when setup stalls or a teammate needs a concrete next step.
page.troubleshootingDescription: High-signal reminders before opening a deeper support thread.

firstValue.title: Reach first value quickly
firstValue.description: Create or activate one ICP, import a CSV, analyze the first batch, then generate a first sequence.

invite.title: Invite a teammate
invite.description: Create the invite in Team, copy the signup link, and ask your teammate to register with the invited email.

recovery.title: Recover account access
recovery.description: Use Forgot password to request a recovery email, then complete the reset from the /reset-password link.

recovery.title: Password reset and account recovery
recovery.body: Request a reset link, open the recovery link, then choose a new password on the recovery page before returning to the workspace.

firstValue.title: First-value workflow
firstValue.body: The shortest path is: activate ICP → import CSV → analyze first batch → review scores → generate one outreach sequence.

lifecycle.title: Team lifecycle
lifecycle.body: Invites and role changes are live. Owner transfer and safe offboarding are still restricted until the platform tenancy model is hardened.

troubleshooting.csv: CSV import: start with company_name and website_url, then add contact fields if available.
troubleshooting.invites: Invites: the teammate must sign up with the exact invited email for automatic workspace join.
troubleshooting.integrations: Integrations: scoring and sequence quality improve when Anthropic, Hunter, and NewsAPI are configured.
troubleshooting.offboarding: Offboarding: safe member removal is intentionally disabled until the tenancy model is hardened.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Lead scoring performance and pipeline insights
analytics.aiBanner: {{count}} leads enriched with AI reasoning, verified internet signals, and tailored score adjustments.

auditLog.title: Audit Log
auditLog.subtitle: Immutable record of all workspace actions and changes.

dialog.title: Import your leads
dialog.subtitle: CSV and Excel (.xlsx) are supported. Review the file, import cleanly, then move to the next best step.
dialog.formatBody: Accepted formats: CSV and .xlsx. Required column: company_name. Helpful columns: website_url, industry, company_size, country, contact_name, contact_role, contact_email, notes, source_list.

icpMissing.title: An active ICP is recommended before import
icpMissing.body: You can still import now, but the first analysis will be more useful with an active ICP. We'll route you to that setup right after if needed.

dropzone.title: Click to upload a CSV or Excel file
dropzone.subtitle: .csv · .xlsx

preview.title: Preview ready — {{count}} rows detected
preview.checkOne: Company names are properly filled in
preview.checkTwo: Website and industry columns look right
preview.checkThree: The detected volume matches your file

success.title: Import complete
success.analyzeHint: Analyze the first {{count}} imported lead(s) to generate scores, signals, and usable outreach copy.
success.icpHint: Activate an ICP now so imported leads are scored against the right profile.

errors.legacyFormat: Legacy .xls and .ods files are disabled for security. Re-export as .xlsx or .csv.
errors.noValidRows: No usable rows found. Make sure a company_name column or equivalent is present.
errors.excelParse: Unable to parse the Excel file: {{message}}
errors.csvInvalid: The CSV must contain at least one valid row with company_name.
errors.csvParse: Unable to parse this CSV file.

toasts.importFailed: Import failed. Check the format and try again.

onboarding.title: Activate your workspace in a few useful steps.
onboarding.subtitle: The goal is not to configure everything. We just want your first value moment: active ICP, imported leads, and a usable first analysis.
onboarding.completeSummary: Your workspace is ready. You can move to the dashboard.

import.title: Import your leads
import.description: Guided CSV/XLSX import with preview, validation, and a clear next step.

demo.title: Clean demo data
demo.description: Load a small credible workspace if you want to test before your real import.
demo.hint: Ideal for testing scoring, signals, and the analysis result view before using your own data.

icp.title: Set your ICP
icp.pending: Define who AimLeads should prioritize first.

import.title: Import leads or load a demo
import.pending: Import a real CSV or load a clean demo dataset.

analysis.title: Run the first analysis
analysis.done: A first lead has already been scored and enriched.
analysis.pending: Generate score, signals, and the next action on a real lead.

review.title: Move into review and follow-up
review.done: The sales workflow has already started.
review.pending: Open the best lead and trigger the next action.

icp.title: Set the target before you score.
icp.description: A quick ICP is enough to avoid vague scores and messy priorities. Fill it in here, then move straight to import.

import.title: Load your first leads to see value fast.
import.description: The fastest path is to import a clean CSV. If you prefer to test first, load the demo and we will open your first analysis result next.

analysis.title: Run the first analysis while the context is fresh.
analysis.description: We take you straight to the best available lead with score, signals, and a recommended action. This is the true first value moment in the product.

review.title: Move from analysis to commercial action.
review.description: Open the strongest lead and trigger the next step: review, pipeline, or first message. This is where the workflow becomes genuinely useful.

complete.title: Your first workflow already stands on its own.
complete.description: You have crossed the minimum useful setup. The next good move is to go to the dashboard to track scores, run more analysis, and keep the pipeline alive.

quickIcp.title: Define a workable ICP in 60 seconds.
quickIcp.subtitle: We are not filling the entire machine right now. We are just setting the right industries, roles, and company size so scoring starts in the right direction.

benefits.fit: Your first scores start from a real target instead of an empty profile.
benefits.roles: Target roles immediately filter out bad leads.
benefits.next: You can fine-tune all weights later in the full ICP page.

placeholders.description: Example: European B2B SaaS teams trying to better prioritize inbound and outbound accounts.

footer.title: Just enough to start strong scoring.
footer.subtitle: Detailed weights and exclusions still live in the full ICP editor.

errors.String must contain at least 2 character: Add a slightly more specific value.
errors.max_gte_min: Max size must be greater than or equal to min size.

toasts.saved: ICP saved. You can now import your first leads.
toasts.failed: Unable to save this quick ICP.

footer.title: Prefer to continue later?
footer.subtitle: The dashboard stays available at any time, but this flow removes dead ends.

toasts.importReadyForAnalysis: Import is ready. Next step: analyze your first lead.
toasts.importReadyForIcp: Import is ready. Activate an ICP now to make scoring useful.
toasts.analysisFailed: Failed to analyze the first lead.
toasts.analysisReady: First result is ready. Open the lead to continue.
